results.title: NATO to unveil billions in defense deals at Ankara summit: Rutte
results.description: NATO will announce tens of billions of dollars in new defense contracts at next month's summit in Türkiye's capital, Ankara, Secretary-General Mark Rutte said Thursday, a...

results.title: Split vote edges Mobile airport toward major consulting contract
results.description: The Mobile Airport Authority could hire a specialized consulting firm to help smooth the opening of its new international terminal. And it could soon put properties on the market to help pay down debt on the new airport.

results.title: How can Twinsburg schools afford $1.7M Tiger Stadium project despite budget cuts, levy failures?
results.description: Twinsburg school officials explained why a $1.7 million stadium renovation continues despite budget cuts, while approving new fees and administrative reductions.
